_purpose: 3 mobile-first 3D games with an OPEN, AIRY vibe (not claustrophobic corridors): floating islands, glider/jetpack traversal, bright distant horizons -- but still a real GAME with a clear mission and some FPS combat. Every goal demands on-screen touch controls (left joystick + right drag-look + >=44px buttons), NO pointer-lock, a COMPACT bottom-anchored weapon viewmodel (tjs-026, <=1/4 screen), and a coarse-pointer perf budget (tjs-027/mob-015). Run via clean_batch_driver.py AFTER relaunch so the new wisdom is loaded.

entries.goal: Build an open, airy 3D adventure across a SKY ARCHIPELAGO of floating low-poly islands under a bright daytime sky with distant clouds and a clear horizon (NOT a dark corridor maze). MISSION: glide between the islands to find and destroy 3 glowing reactor cores guarded by hovering drones, then reach the extraction beacon. Movement: walk + a GLIDER/jetpack to soar between islands (smooth delta-time, gentle banking). Combat: a plasma rifle whose first-person viewmodel is COMPACT and anchored lower-right (at most ~1/4 of the screen) so the wide-open vista and enemies stay fully visible. FULLY mobile-playable: left on-screen joystick to move, right side drag-to-look, a fire button and a glide/jump button (all >=44px), no pointer-lock. Bright readable lighting, mission/objective HUD + an off-screen arrow to the next core, 60fps with a lower budget on phones.

Build a small OPEN-WORLD GTA-lite you can roam freely on a sunny low-poly island town (open streets, parks, a beach, distant hills -- airy and bright, not enclosed). MISSION CHAIN: hop into a hover-car and complete a short string of jobs -- drive to a marker, pick up a package, deliver it before a timer, then evade two pursuer drones -- with a simple wanted/score HUD. Switch between driving and on-foot. Light combat: a compact, lower-right blaster viewmodel for the chase (never filling the screen). FULLY mobile: on-screen joystick + steer/accelerate/brake buttons while driving, drag-look on foot, action buttons >=44px, no pointer-lock. Portrait + landscape, 60fps, readable minimap.

Build an airy OPEN-ARENA FPS set on a cluster of floating sky-fortress platforms high above the clouds (wide open, bright, vertigo-inducing views -- the opposite of a cramped catacomb). MISSION: defend the central core through escalating waves of flying enemies, using a jetpack DASH to leap between platforms and reposition. Combat: a plasma weapon with a COMPACT lower-right viewmodel (<=1/4 screen) so the open skybox and incoming enemies are always visible; health/ammo/wave HUD. FULLY mobile-playable: left joystick to move, right drag-to-look, fire + dash buttons (>=44px), no pointer-lock. Clean white-and-cyan lighting, 60fps with a reduced budget on coarse-pointer devices, win after surviving the final wave with a Restart button.
